title: ZenithPlus
description: Utilities Mod for Monumenta MMO, specifically Zenith.
body:
# ZenithPlus
 Mod designed to enhance the Zenith Experience. Made for Monumenta MMO.

### Features
- Change Gravity Bomb highlight color
- Broodmother and Vesperidys Start Timer
- Change Broodmother limb glowing color, depending on health
- Remove fire from Broodmother limbs
